title: Advice Surgeries | Preet Kaur Gill
meta_description: Find out when Preet Kaur Gill MP is holding her next advice surgery in Bartley Green, Edgbaston, Harborne or Quinton
text_excerpt: --> Advice Surgeries | Preet Kaur Gill top of page Preet Kaur Gill for Birmingham Edgbaston Home Advice Surgeries News Weekly Updates Parliamentary News Constituency Letters Media Newsletter Sign Up Useful Information More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Contact Advice Surgeries Advice Surgeries North Edgbaston 10.30-11.30am First Friday of each month St Germain's Church, City Road, B17 8LE Directions North Edgbaston 3.30-4.30pm First Friday of each month City Road School (City Road Entrance), B16 0HL Directions Quinton 5.15-6:30pm First Friday of each month Quinborne Centre, Ridgacre Road, B32 2TW Directions Harborne 7.00-8.00pm First Friday of each month Lordswood Girls School, Knightlow Road, B17 8QB Directions Edgbaston 10:30-11:30am Second Thursday of each month Edgbaston Community Centre, 40 Woodview Drive, B15 2HU Directions Bartley Green 12.00-1:00pm Second Thursday of each month Newman University, Genners Lane, B32 3NT Directions CAN'T MAKE A SURGERY? Get in contact with Preet Write to Preet House of Commons London SW1A 0AA ​ Phone Preet 0121 392 8426 ​ Email Preet preet.gill.mp@parliament.uk Contact Preet Online Preet Kaur Gill MP for Birmingham Edgbaston covering Bartley Green, Edgbaston, Harborne, Quinton and North Edgbaston Privacy Policy Contact Me Write to Preet House of Commons London SW1A 0AA ​ Phone Preet 0121 392 8426 ​ Email Preet preet.gill.mp@parliament.uk Sign up to my email newsletter Preet Kaur Gill will contact you about her work using the data you have supplied.
